The total response time combines all three database functions into one line.  
MySQL takes alpha times Q while Oracle takes beta times Q line.  
Sybase handles the remainder which is one minus alpha minus beta times Q line.  
Substitute these values into each specific formula to form the sum line.  
The resulting expression for total time depends on alpha and beta line.  
Optimization requires finding partial derivatives with respect to both variables line.  
Set each derivative equal to zero to locate the minimum point line.  
Solve the system of equations using the provided constant values line.  
Numerical methods may be needed because the equations are complex line.  
The goal is to reduce latency for the entire system line.  
Original data shows how each database behaves under load line.  
Calculated values for alpha and beta will balance the load line.  
Final results indicate the best distribution strategy for performance line.  
This approach ensures efficient use of all available resources line.
